validation_password_short: The password must be at least 8 characters long
validation_password_long: The password must be at most 63 characters long
validation_password_uppercase: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter
validation_password_lowercase: The password must contain at least one lowercase letter
validation_password_digit: The password must contain at least one digit
